PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: FUNCTION_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(FUNCTION)('function')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('someting')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
